  • Uses of DiscoveryCredentials in org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.config

    Methods in org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.config that return DiscoveryCredentials
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DiscoveryCredentials
    DiscoveryConfigReader.credentialsFromEnvSysOnly()
     
    static DiscoveryCredentials
    DiscoveryChannelConfigReader.resolveFromJcr(String channelId, Session session)
    Called from CMS: reads the hst:channelinfo JCR node directly via the module session.
    static DiscoveryCredentials
    DiscoveryChannelConfigReader.resolveFromJcr(String channelId, Session session, Function<String,String> envResolver)
    Overload with explicit env resolver — use to control env resolution in tests or frameworks that manage environment variables differently.
    static DiscoveryCredentials
    DiscoveryChannelConfigReader.resolveOverrides(String accountId, String domainKey, String apiKeyEnvVar, String authKeyEnvVar)
    Called from site: values already resolved by the HST framework from hst:channelinfo.
    static DiscoveryCredentials
    DiscoveryChannelConfigReader.resolveOverrides(String accountId, String domainKey, String apiKeyEnvVar, String authKeyEnvVar, Function<String,String> envResolver)
    Overload with explicit env resolver — use to control env resolution in tests or frameworks that manage environment variables differently.
